scope1_narrative: Scope 1 emissions of 12028 tCO2e arise from direct combustion of petrol and diesel in the company's 51 vehicle fleet, calculated using DEFRA 2024 mobile combustion factors at Tier 2 by vehicle class, adjusted for Kenyan road conditions (+18% per NTSA data).
intensity_narrative: The company achieved an emission intensity of 0.78 tCO2e/KSh M, a increase of 2.9% versus FY2023.
uncertainty_narrative: Uncertainty quantification via PyMC Monte Carlo (10,000 samples) yields a 95% CI of 18849–20120 tCO2e (±3.3%).
recommendation_narrative: Transitioning 38% of the heavy diesel fleet to EVs could reduce Scope 1 emissions by an estimated 1111 tCO2e annually at approximately KSh 9191 per tonne avoided.
